subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that there is no God but Him; unto Him belong majesty and grandeur, exaltation and power and grace. He bestoweth upon whom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الجلال و الرفعه و القدره و الافضال یعطی من
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for service, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
